nasb.text: also for the divisions of the priests and the Levites and for all the work of the service of the house of the Lord and for all the utensils of service in the house of the Lord;

esv.text: for the divisions of the priests and of the Levites, and all the work of the service in the house of the Lord; for all the vessels for the service in the house of the Lord,

cnv.text: 又把祭司和利未人的班次，耶和華殿裡各樣的職事和耶和華殿裡一切需用的器皿，都指示了他；

ccb.text: 大卫还让他知道祭司和利未人的班次、耶和华殿里各样的工作及一切所需的器皿，
